name: SONOCO PRODUCTS CO
summary: PART I . (a) General Development of Business Sonoco Products Company (Sonoco, the Company, we, us, or our) is a South Carolina corporation founded in Hartsville, South Carolina, in 1899 as the Southern Novelty Company with the guiding principle that People Build Businesses by doing the right things. At its beginnings in 1899, a team of 12 people worked from a rented warehouse to produce the Companys first product, a cone-shaped paper yarn carrier used for winding and transporting yarn.
